heading: Availability of appropriations for Migratory Bird Treaty Act
label: 668d Availability of appropriations for Migratory Bird Treaty Act
text: Moneys now or hereafter available to the Secretary of the Interior for the administration and enforcement of the Migratory Bird Treaty Act of [ et seq.], shall be equally available for the administration and enforcement of this subchapter.July 3, 191816 U.S.C. 703
notes: References in TextThe Migratory Bird Treaty Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to subchapter II (§ 703 et seq.) of chapter 7 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act July 3, 1918, ch. 12840 Stat. 755section 710 of this title
